title: Microsoft lays off 3,200 Xbox employees, cancels Avowed, and prepares a new Fallout with the creators of New Vegas
summary: Microsoft's restructuring plan leads to the cancellation of the RPG Avowed, the start of a new Fallout by Obsidian, and reactions from unions and Senator Bernie Sanders.

title: Nintendo will shut down Mario Kart Tour in September 2026
summary: The popular mobile racing game will permanently cease to operate, as Nintendo accelerates its withdrawal from the free-to-play market.

title: Square Enix puts an end to Final Fantasy VII Ever Crisis in October
summary: The gacha mobile game of the Final Fantasy VII saga will shut down its service in October, adding to the company's decline of games as a service.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced dominates sales and reviews in its return
summary: The remake of Ubisoft's classic pirate game earns excellent scores and exceeds commercial expectations, becoming the most successful launch in the saga in years.

title: Palworld reaches 40 million players before its 1.0 launch
summary: Pocketpair's survival game maintains its current price and prepares to leave early access with a huge active community.

title: Minecraft adds the ability to sit down after 17 years of history
summary: The update introduces new items and the mechanic of sitting on blocks, changing the way of interacting with the game world.

title: Bithell Games announces Vampirium 1997, a vampire simulator with Dracula as king
summary: The indie studio presents an immersive game in an uchronic England where Dracula is the monarch and the player acts as his personal assassin.

title: Destiny 2 fans create a tomato game against Bungie's ex-CEO
summary: As a protest against the game's decline, fans develop a parody title where they throw tomatoes at Pete Parsons' car collection.

title: Marvel Rivals premieres season 9 changing the balance of 80% of the characters
summary: NetEase launches a major update that seeks fun over balance and solves the Apocalypse mystery from the previous season.

title: Nintendo expands the Game Boy and Game Boy Advance catalog on Switch Online
summary: Four new classic games, including Wario Land: Super Mario Land 3, are added to the subscription service for Nintendo Switch users.

title: The Blood of Dawnwalker surprises with its short duration and style similar to The Witcher
summary: The medieval vampire RPG allows completing the story in less time than expected and offers mechanics reminiscent of CD Projekt's saga.

title: Subnautica 2 allows stunning fish in its first major update
summary: Players of the underwater survival game can now defend themselves from marine life without having to kill.

title: Love and Deepspace loses its werewolf love interest by order of the Chinese government
summary: The controversy in the dating game continues after confirmation that the character was permanently removed by Chinese authorities.

title: Nintendo withdraws the original Switch from Europe due to legal changes in batteries
summary: Nintendo's original console will stop being sold in Europe due to new EU regulations on batteries and right to repair.

title: Sony eliminates physical discs and players respond by canceling PS Plus
summary: The decision to prioritize the digital format sparks criticism and a wave of subscription cancellations, although some users discover they can save this way.

title: Arc Raiders introduces separate queues for solo, duo, and trio
summary: The extraction game allows players to choose group size and maintain independent matchmaking statistics for each mode.

title: Mortal Shell 2 launches on August 20 and promises greater difficulty
summary: The long-awaited sequel to the Soulslike confirms its release date for this summer, with promises of an even greater challenge.

title: Build a Rocket Boy workers protest a fan event while suffering layoffs
summary: Employees of the MindsEye studio plan to demonstrate during a company-paid event, denouncing poor working conditions and cutbacks.

title: Two brothers confess to the theft of more than £71,000 in Pokémon cards
summary: Those responsible for a series of thefts in collectible stores were captured and have pleaded guilty to the crime.

title: The Crew Motorfest will arrive on Nintendo Switch 2 on October 8
summary: Ubisoft's open-world racing game confirms its release date on Nintendo's new console.
